projects.description: Backend and frontend maintenance and feature development for a large-scale travel platform. Key achievements include the migration of Sabre endpoints for train reservations and a framework transition from Angular 1.5 to React 18.
projects.stack: C#, TypeScript, JavaScript, .NET Framework, ASP.NET Core Web API, React, MSSQL Server, Azure, Docker, GitHub Copilot.
keyActivities: Architected and developed new application modules and features.
Collaborated directly with the client to define requirements and distribute tasks.
Conducted code reviews and refactoring to ensure high-quality standards.
Performed comprehensive unit and integration testing.
Actively participated in the end-to-end PR process, providing constructive feedback and facilitating technical alignment within the development team.
Authored technical support documentation for internal and external use.

projects.description: Developed new features and resolved critical bugs for a healthcare platform.
keyActivities: Cloud Services: Integrated AWS services including SQS, CloudSearch, CloudWatch, EC2, and Route53.
CI/CD: Utilized Azure DevOps for automated deployment.
Key Achievements: Implemented Google Sign-In integration, built a subscription system, and integrated third-party APIs (Chargify, CQC, NumVerify, and Fountain).

projects.description: Worked as a Backend Developer focused on scalability and performance.
projects.stack: JavaScript, Docker, REST APIs, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Kafka, S3, and SQS.

bullets: Worked in a fast-paced Agile/Kanban environment for multiple US-based clients.
Developed a multi-cloud serverless solution using Node.js, focusing on high availability and scalability.
Built an automated security tool using AWS SQS and JavaScript to trigger open-source antivirus scans on files uploaded to S3 buckets.
Gained extensive experience in Microservices architecture, TypeScript, and NoSQL databases across both AWS and Azure ecosystems.

jobExperienceList.description: I worked for a French firm using ASP.NET (C#), doing maintenance of a website, creating new features and fixing bugs.

This was my first job as a Software Developer. I worked for multiple projects and clients. I used a lot of different technologies such as Cobol, .NET WebForms, Angular, CSS, HTML, Git, and MVC pattern. Also learnt to work with Agile methodologies.
